properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 79/21
 1. SEISMIC VESSEL RAMFORM HYPERION WILL CONDUCT A SEISMIC SURVEY WITH M/V SANCO SWIFT AND TWO ESCORT VESSELS M/V THOR OMEGA AND M/V MIRANDA.
 RAMFORM HYPERION WILL TOW SEISMIC CABELS WITH LENGTH 8000 METERS AND IS RESTRICTED IN HER ABILITY TO MANEUVER.

 2. AREA BOUNDEED BY:
 73-17.3N 028-57.3E
 73-13.5N 030-52.9E
 72-21.6N 030-02.1E
 72-25.0N 028-11.9E

 3. A WIDE BERTH IS REQUESTED 3 NM AHEAD 3 NM PORT AND STARBORD AND 6 NM ASTERN.
